title: Florida Statutes § 775.0848 — Offenses committed by an unauthorized alien; reclassification.
text:
775.0848 Offenses committed by an unauthorized alien; reclassification.—The penalty for any misdemeanor or felony committed by an unauthorized alien as defined in s. 908.111 shall be reclassified in the following manner:(1) A misdemeanor of the second degree is reclassified to a misdemeanor of the first degree.

(2) A misdemeanor of the first degree is reclassified to a felony of the third degree.

(3) A felony of the third degree is reclassified to a felony of the second degree.

(4) A felony of the second degree is reclassified to a felony of the first degree.

(5) A felony of the first degree is reclassified to a life felony.
